entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:12.053394 from 'https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/entire/us-gaap-entryPoint-std-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\VRME_instance_2023_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0068.7641] The filing has used the StatementGeographicalAxis in conjunction with the line item us-gaap:DefinedBenefitPlanContributionsByEmployer with a value of 10,000 in the Compensation Related Costs and Retirement Benefits section of the taxonomy. These line items should not use the StatementGeographicalAxis to report a fact. To identify the physical location of the securities a member should be created that indicates both the type of security and its issuance location. i.e. EquityUSMmember
The properties of this us-gaap:DefinedBenefitPlanContributionsByEmployer fact are: Period :2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31 Dimensions : srt:StatementGeographicalAxis=country:NZ Unit : USD
Rule Element Id:7641 Rule version: 29.0.2 - VRME_instance_2023_2025.xml 10509
